leadText: For the handheld spin-off game, see Cyber Poké Ball The Cyber Ball (Japanese: ゲーミングボール Gaming Ball) is a type of picnic item introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Cyber Ball can be brought out during a picnic to be kicked around by the player and their party Pokémon.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A ball themed after hardcore gaming PCs. It may not light up like its inspiration, but it still stands out.
